message:
test: add 8 privacy-focused proptest properties for connector inbound bridge

Expand proptest_connector_inbound_bridge.rs from 29 to 37 tests with new
privacy classification integration coverage:
- Clean payloads accepted without redaction
- Classification telemetry tracks rejection counts across multiple signals
- Audit log accumulates entries for routed signals
- Default bridge has at least one classification policy
- Mixed clean/rejected signals telemetry sums correctly
- Routed signal Detection includes classification metadata (overall_sensitivity,
  ingestion_decision, source_connector)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
